name: GitHub
description: Manage GitHub repos, issues, PRs, releases, and actions using the gh CLI. Agents get structured access to your repositories.
contextSnippet:
## GitHub (gh CLI)

The GitHub skill is enabled. Use `gh` CLI for all GitHub operations.

### Common commands
- `gh issue list/create/view/edit/close`
- `gh pr list/create/view/merge/checks`
- `gh release list/create/upload/delete`
- `gh run list/view/watch`
- `gh api <endpoint>` for any REST/GraphQL call

### Rules
- Always use `--json` flag for structured output (e.g. `gh issue list --json number,title,state`)
- Default repo: {GITHUB_DEFAULT_REPO}
- Use `gh auth status` to verify authentication
